mapper.update: UPDATE WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND SET IS_TALLY = 1, CONFIRM_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, CONFIRM_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COFIRM_TIME = #{now} WHERE NOTE_ID = #{noteId}

UPDATE WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND SET IS_TALLY = 0, CONFIRM_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, CONFIRM_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COFIRM_TIME = #{now} WHERE NOTE_ID = #{noteId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(NOTE_ID) FROM WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND WHERE NOTE_ID = #{id} AND IS_FINISHED = 1
